---
title: "Download-button Example"
---

## Basic

This extension adds a shortcode that adds a download button, for example

```{.txt shortcodes="false"}
{{< download-button path="test-file.txt" text="Download PyMOL Script" filename="pymol.pml" >}}
```

Becomes this button

{{< download-button path="test-file.txt" text="Download PyMOL Script" filename="pymol.pml" >}}

Whereas 

```{.txt shortcodes="false"}
{{< download-button path="test-file.txt" >}}
````

Becomes this button

{{< download-button path="test-file.txt" >}}
